title: oenothera micrantha var. exfoliata
intro: Oenothera micrantha var. exfoliata, also known as small-flowered evening primrose, is a species of flowering plant in the evening primrose family that is native to North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving skin conditions, as well as supporting digestive and respiratory health. Oenothera micrantha var. exfoliata can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or taken internally to promote overall well-being.
